articles.title: Nintendo Shares Slide After 2026 Game Showcase Disappoints - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Nintendo Co.’s shares fell by the most in a month after the game maker’s presentation of upcoming games came up short on brand-new titles from heavyweight franchises such as Mario.

articles.description: The App Store will soon include subscription bundles for iPhone apps from different companies, along with “suites” of subscriptions.
